BreakEvenAnalysis.Context: Numbers on the weekend baking business before deciding whether to rent commercial kitchen time.

CurrentState.Note: Membership line is the standing weekly-order customers; ingredients are the main cost.

Scenario_A_RentTo750.Label: Flour & butter up 15%
Scenario_A_RentTo750.Impact: Tight margin; raise prices $2 per item if costs hold.

Scenario_B_RentTo850.Label: Holiday rush - double orders
Scenario_B_RentTo850.Impact: Great upside in Nov-Dec; cap orders so I don't burn out.

BreakEvenAnalysis.KeyInsight: Break-even is ~19-20 standing orders. Small margin - this stays a side thing unless I scale the kitchen.
ActionItems: Raise pecan pie and cinnamon roll prices for the holidays
